prompt: Use my uploaded portrait only as the identity reference: preserve my facial features, hairstyle, hairline, skin tone, and natural presence. Create a realistic cinematic seaside portrait at sunset, vertical 9:16. The person stands near the ocean with strong backlight, wind-blown hair, flying seagulls close to the camera with slight motion blur, soft ocean waves in the background, dreamy red lens flare and film grain. Outfit and styling should follow the reference image: bold youthful fashion, red heart-shaped top with light denim elements, subtle accessories. Natural skin texture, realistic lighting, real camera feel, not over-polished.
